description: Authorizes the Underground Silo Complex project and defines its purpose, high-level scope, governance, funding, milestones, success criteria, and initial approvals.
steps_to_create: Clarify project objectives and success criteria
Identify primary stakeholders and governance roles
Outline high-level scope, boundaries, and dependencies
Summarize risks, assumptions, and constraints
Define initial budget range and funding sources
Obtain formal approvals from executive sponsor and steering committee
approval_authorities: Executive Sponsor; Project Steering Committee; Chief Financial Officer; Legal Counsel

description: Initial baseline assessment of governance, control, information management, and risk posture to inform strategic planning.
steps_to_create: Inventory existing governance policies, controls, and information flows
Perform gap analysis against planned frameworks
Interview key stakeholders across governance, risk, and operations
Identify initial metrics and data requirements
Summarize findings in a baseline report and highlight gaps for progression

description: High-level policy framework outlining options for social control mechanisms, their indicators, alignment with ethics, and governance requirements.
steps_to_create: Define the three strategic options for social control (hierarchical, self-regulation, gamified systems)
Identify success metrics and potential unintended consequences
Map alignment with Ethical Oversight and Information Control frameworks
Draft governance and accountability mechanisms
approval_authorities: Ethics Oversight Committee; Steering Committee; Executive Sponsor

description: High-level framework governing information dissemination, censorship boundaries, tiered access, and misinformation management.
steps_to_create: Describe information flow policies and censorship boundaries
Create tiered access profiles by role and status
Outline monitoring, auditing, and incident response for misinformation
Define alignment with Ethical Oversight and Social Control policies
approval_authorities: Ethics Oversight Committee; Chief Information Officer; Steering Committee

description: High-level governance for ethical decision-making, including committees, AI oversight, audits, and accountability mechanisms.
steps_to_create: Define structure of ethics governance (committees, reporting lines)
Outline AI/bias assessment procedures and citizen audits
Establish audit schedule and whistleblower protections
Specify escalation and remediation pathways
approval_authorities: Executive Sponsor; Ethics Committee; Legal Counsel

description: High-level resource allocation principles and governance across centralized, market-based, and circular models with sustainability focus.
steps_to_create: Articulate allocation principles (centralized, market, circular)
Define metrics for efficiency, equity, and resilience
Outline governance processes, monitoring, and reporting
Assess implications for technology and societal structure
approval_authorities: Steering Committee; Finance Lead; Executive Sponsor

description: High-level register of identified risks, owners, likelihood/severity, and initial mitigations to inform planning.
steps_to_create: Catalog risks from frameworks and baseline assessments
Assign owners and initial mitigations
Estimate likelihood and impact
Prioritize and link to contingency planning
Publish to the governance documentation for review

description: Plan for engaging government, private investors, and communities; channels, cadence, messaging, and feedback mechanisms.
steps_to_create: Identify key stakeholder groups and their interests
Define engagement objectives, channels, and cadence
Develop messaging and feedback mechanisms
Assign owners and review cycles
Finalize approvals from sponsor and stakeholder committee

description: Outline funding sources, allocations, contingencies, and governance for financial oversight during planning.
steps_to_create: Outline total budget and allocation by domain (excavation, infrastructure, ecosystem, contingency)
Identify funding sources (government, private, grants) and timelines
Define contingency reserves and financial controls
Establish reporting cadence and approvals
approval_authorities: Heads of Finance; Executive Sponsor; Steering Committee
